headline: Is Kroger (KR) Pricing Reflect Its DCF Upside And High P/E Multiple?
summary: If you are wondering whether Kroger is priced in line with what you are actually getting, this article walks through what the current share price could be implying about value. With the stock at US$72.35 and returns of 14.9% year to date and 113.0% over 5 years, many investors are asking whether the recent pullback of 1.2% over 7 days and 2.4% over 30 days is a pause or a warning sign. Recent headlines around Kroger have focused on its position in the US grocery market and the ongoing...
